Test Goal: Confirm protected session is not created before MFA
Valid Candidate If: Authenticated session or account area accessible without completing MFA
Stop Conditions: Any third-party data or instability observed

Test Goal: Confirm sensitive setting cannot be changed pre-Step-Up
Valid Candidate If: Security setting changes without successful Step-Up
Stop Conditions: Unexpected account impact beyond owned test account

Test Goal: Confirm credential change requires verified second factor
Valid Candidate If: Credential changes without completing required challenge
Stop Conditions: Loss of access risk not recoverable on test account

Test Goal: Check recovery does not remove or replace MFA without proper verification
Valid Candidate If: MFA removed/replaced or access recovered without required verification
Stop Conditions: Flow requests third-party or unsupported identity data

Expected MFA/SCA/Step-Up: SCA required for regulated or risky payment flow
Test Goal: Confirm payment action cannot complete before SCA
Valid Candidate If: Payment or protected payment step succeeds without SCA
Stop Conditions: Any real funds risk or unintended transaction risk

Test Goal: Check PayPal-controlled partner auth enforces MFA consistently
Valid Candidate If: Partner-authenticated session is created without completing PayPal MFA

Expected MFA/SCA/Step-Up: Challenge bound to original action and context
Test Goal: Check one flow's challenge state is not accepted by another flow
Valid Candidate If: Different protected action succeeds using unrelated or incomplete challenge state
Stop Conditions: Ambiguous state or no protected action completed

Expected MFA/SCA/Step-Up: MFA remains required across web/mobile transition
Test Goal: Check channel switch does not bypass required MFA
Valid Candidate If: Action completes in another channel without completing required MFA
Stop Conditions: Requires device compromise or out-of-scope mobile setup

Expected MFA/SCA/Step-Up: Strong method remains enforced when policy requires it
Test Goal: Check fallback does not weaken required auth without policy reason
Valid Candidate If: Weaker method accepted where stronger method was required
Stop Conditions: Testing becomes OTP brute force or rate-limit probing

Expected MFA/SCA/Step-Up: Verified state only set after successful MFA
Test Goal: Check UI/API agree on MFA verification state
Valid Candidate If: API treats session as MFA-verified while challenge is incomplete
Stop Conditions: No protected action is reachable or completed
